project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 App Router with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4
build_system: bun (npm not available in sandbox). Uses bun install and bun run build. Bun 1.2.14 is available. Some worker_threads warnings appear during build but do not affect compilation.
test_framework: No test framework configured. Verification is via successful build (bun run build).
verification_instructions: Run 'bun run build' in /projects/sandbox/nextjs-boilerplate and confirm it compiles successfully with all routes listed.
environment_constraints: npm is not available - use bun instead. Bun 1.2.14 is installed via mise. Network is OPEN_INTERNET so all package installs work. No Docker needed. worker_threads warnings from Next.js build are non-fatal.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md says to read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code. Key findings: App Router uses file-system routing, layouts/pages pattern, Server Components by default with 'use client' directive for interactive components, metadata via exported Metadata objects, Tailwind CSS 4 with @import 'tailwindcss' pattern.
key_patterns: App Router file conventions: app/page.tsx for pages, app/layout.tsx for layouts, nested folders for routes. Server Components by default - add 'use client' directive for components using state/effects/browser APIs. Metadata exported as static objects or generateMetadata functions. Tailwind CSS 4 setup already working with @tailwindcss/postcss plugin. Path alias @/* maps to project root. Geist font family configured with CSS variables.
directory_structure: / - project root with config files. /app - App Router pages and layouts. /public - static assets. /node_modules/next/dist/docs/ - Next.js documentation to reference.
